## 🛡️ Security Checklist

- [ ] **No hardcoded secrets**: I have verified that no API keys, passwords, or other secrets are included in this PR.
- [ ] **Input validation**: All user-provided data is properly validated and sanitized.
- [ ] **Secure error handling**: Errors are handled gracefully and do not leak sensitive information (e.g., stack traces).
- [ ] **Least privilege**: This change follows the principle of least privilege.
- [ ] **Data protection**: Sensitive data is handled securely and not logged.
